---
title: "test"
format: html
---

``` {r}
d <- data.frame(readxl::read_excel("~/collaborative-data-science/data/03202026_LE18_Camk2A_IP_01.xlsx", sheet = "Proteins"), na.rm = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
d <- na.omit(d)
```

``` {r}
p <- pca(d)
p
```

``` {r}
s <- scree_plot(p$eigen_values, threshold = 85, y_axis = "Percentage")
s
```

``` {r}
c <- cluster_analysis(p$pca, num_clusters= 5, nstart = 5)
c
```

``` {r}
d <- d %>%
  mutate(cluster = c$cluster_values)
```
